title: CCHR — Shared Definitions
description: Reusable JSON Schema definitions shared across NYC Commission on Human Rights (CCHR) object schemas. Reconciles fields common to the CCHR Open Data datasets (data.cityofnewyork.us), nyc.gov/site/cchr, and the 'Report Discrimination' intake form. Includes the NYC geography spine plus the enforcement vocabularies of the NYC Human Rights Law — protected classes and protected areas.

x-nyc-commons.note: Geography/identifier/address/money definitions are $ref'd from the canonical nyc-commons set; agency-specific definitions remain local.

Borough.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (geography.json#/$defs/Borough); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Borough still resolve.

Coordinates.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (geography.json#/$defs/Coordinates); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Coordinates still resolve.

Geography.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (geography.json#/$defs/GeographySpine); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Geography still resolve.

ProtectedArea.description: The area of city life in which the NYC Human Rights Law prohibits discrimination — mirrors the 'Category of Discrimination' choices on the Report Discrimination form and the columns of the Inquiries Received dataset.

ProtectedClass.description: A category protected from discrimination under the NYC Human Rights Law (Title 8 of the Administrative Code). The basis of a complaint. Coverage varies by protected area (e.g. source of income and lawful source of income apply to housing).
enum: Status as a Victim of Domestic Violence, Stalking, or Sex Offenses

FiscalPeriod.description: The reporting period carried by CCHR's aggregate operational datasets (fiscal year, or calendar year + month).
